references.title_en: The PRISMA 2020 Statement: An Updated Guideline for Reporting Systematic Reviews
references.title_zh: PRISMA 2020 声明：系统评价报告更新指南
references.authors_or_org: Page MJ, McKenzie JE, Bossuyt PM, et al.
references.summary_zh: 系统评价报告的 27 条标准清单，覆盖检索、筛选、质量评估与综合全流程；为 skill 工程的资料搜集提供完整多阶段报告框架。
references.summary_en: The canonical 27-item checklist for reporting systematic reviews, covering search, screening, appraisal, and synthesis; a complete multi-stage evidence-collection template for skill-engineering research pipelines.
references.reliability_notes: Published BMJ 2021; maintained by the PRISMA Executive; highly stable standard updated from the 2009 version.

references.title_en: Cochrane Handbook for Systematic Reviews of Interventions, Version 6.5
references.title_zh: Cochrane 干预性系统评价手册（第 6.5 版）
references.authors_or_org: Higgins JPT, Thomas J, et al. (Cochrane)
references.summary_zh: 系统评价领域最权威的方法学手册，详述检索策略、偏倚评估、证据综合与 GRADE 评级；为 skill 工程的证据质量评估和搜集规程提供黄金标准参考。
references.summary_en: The authoritative gold-standard handbook for systematic-review methodology: search strategies, bias assessment, and evidence synthesis; the canonical reference for evidence-quality grading and data-collection protocols.
references.reliability_notes: Version 6.5 (2024); continuously updated by Cochrane; highest-authority methodology source.

references.title_en: GRADE: Grading of Recommendations Assessment, Development and Evaluation
references.title_zh: GRADE：推荐意见评级体系工作组
references.authors_or_org: GRADE Working Group
references.summary_zh: 对证据质量（高/中/低/极低）和推荐强度进行系统评级的框架，被 130+ 机构采用；为 skill 工程判定来源权威性与信息可信度提供分级规范。
references.summary_en: The globally dominant framework (130+ endorsing organizations) for rating evidence quality and recommendation strength; informs how data collection should grade source authority and confidence.
references.reliability_notes: Established 2000; actively maintained; the foundational BMJ 2004 paper is highly cited and stable.

references.title_en: Admiralty Code (NATO Source Reliability and Information Credibility Scales)
references.title_zh: 海军部代码：北约来源可靠性与信息可信度双轴评级
references.authors_or_org: NATO / British Royal Navy (formalized in AJP-2.1)
references.summary_zh: 双轴字母-数字评级（A-F 来源可靠性 × 1-6 信息可信度），被情报机构采用；可直接迁移为 skill 工程对信源与单条情报信度的结构化评分模板。
references.summary_en: NATO two-axis alphanumeric grading (A-F source reliability x 1-6 information credibility) used by intelligence analysts; directly transferable as a structured source-scoring rubric for data collection.
references.reliability_notes: Wikipedia article is well-sourced; primary standard is NATO AJP-2.1; methodology is stable and widely described.

references.title_en: SIFT: The Four Moves (Check, Please! Starter Course)
references.title_zh: SIFT 四步法：停、查源、找报道、溯原文
references.authors_or_org: Mike Caulfield (Washington State University)
references.summary_zh: Stop-Investigate-Find-Trace 四步横向阅读核实法；为 skill 工程提供可操作的多源交叉验证和声明溯源流程，适用于快速鉴别 agent 搜索结果可信度。
references.summary_en: The SIFT (Stop, Investigate, Find, Trace) lateral-reading method for rapid source-credibility verification; an operationalizable cross-check and claim-tracing workflow for agent search pipelines.
references.reliability_notes: Released 2019 under CC-BY; adopted at hundreds of institutions; method is stable though some lesson pages have moved.

references.title_en: An Introduction to Triangulation (UNAIDS Monitoring and Evaluation Fundamentals)
references.title_zh: 三角验证入门：UNAIDS 监测与评估基础
references.authors_or_org: UNAIDS
references.summary_zh: 多源三角验证方法入门，涵盖数据、调查员、理论、方法四种三角化；为 skill 工程的多源数据收集与交叉印证提供操作框架。
references.summary_en: A primer on the four types of triangulation (data, investigator, theory, methodological); a structured multi-source corroboration framework for evidence pipelines.
references.reliability_notes: Published by UNAIDS; stable authoritative UN source; applies foundational Denzin 1978 method.

references.title_en: Triangulation (BetterEvaluation Methods Library)
references.title_zh: 三角验证法（BetterEvaluation 方法库）
references.authors_or_org: BetterEvaluation / Global Evaluation Initiative
references.summary_zh: 整理四种三角验证类型、目的（确认/反驳/丰富/解释）及减偏策略；为 skill 工程的多角度证据汇聚与矛盾处理提供操作参考。
references.summary_en: A practice-oriented reference for triangulation types, purposes (confirm/refute/enrich/explain), and bias reduction; informs multi-source convergence and contradiction handling.
references.reliability_notes: Maintained by the Global Evaluation Initiative; concise page linking to primary sources; moderate stability.

references.title_en: PROV-Overview: An Overview of the PROV Family of Documents
references.title_zh: W3C PROV 概览：来源数据模型标准家族
references.authors_or_org: W3C Provenance Working Group
references.summary_zh: 定义数据来源（实体、活动、代理）的互操作标准家族，用于追踪内容产生历史；为 skill 工程的声明溯源和证据链记录提供标准数据模型。
references.summary_en: The W3C standard family for modeling provenance (entities, activities, agents); the canonical data model for claim-evidence traceability in research systems.
references.reliability_notes: W3C Recommendation (April 2013); stable and authoritative.

references.title_en: Self-RAG: Learning to Retrieve, Generate, and Critique through Self-Reflection
references.title_zh: Self-RAG：通过自我反思学习检索、生成与批判
references.authors_or_org: Asai A, Wu Z, Wang Y, Sil A, Hajishirzi H
references.summary_zh: 训练 LLM 自适应按需检索并用反思令牌自我批判；为 skill 工程提供检索-评估-迭代直到满足度的实现范式。
references.summary_en: Trains an LLM to adaptively retrieve on demand and self-critique via reflection tokens; a concrete pattern for loop-until-saturation retrieval in data-gathering agents.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2310.11511; ICLR 2024 Oral; highly cited; URL verified to resolve.

references.title_en: DeepRAG: Thinking to Retrieve Step by Step for Large Language Models
references.title_zh: DeepRAG：大语言模型逐步思考检索框架
references.authors_or_org: Guan X, Zeng J, Meng F, et al.
references.summary_zh: 将 RAG 建模为马尔可夫决策过程，逐步分解问题并动态决定每步是否检索；为 skill 工程的迭代深化检索提供决策级参考。
references.summary_en: Models RAG as a Markov Decision Process for step-by-step decomposition with dynamic retrieve-or-reason decisions; a blueprint for iterative-deepening data collection.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2502.01142 (Feb 2025); URL verified; preprint by established NLP groups.

references.title_en: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Survey on Agentic RAG
references.title_zh: 智能体增强检索生成：Agentic RAG 综述
references.authors_or_org: Singh A, Ehtesham A, Kumar S, Khoei TT, Vasilakos AV
references.summary_zh: 梳理 Agentic RAG 架构分类（单/多智能体、规划/反思/工具调用）及应用；为 skill 工程设计多步证据收集管道提供全景综述。
references.summary_en: A taxonomy of Agentic RAG architectures including planning, reflection, and multi-agent collaboration; the survey reference for designing multi-step evidence-collection pipelines.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2501.09136 (Jan 2025); URL verified; widely cited survey.

references.title_en: Question Decomposition for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
references.title_zh: 面向检索增强生成的问题分解方法
references.authors_or_org: Ammann PJL, Golde J, Akbik A
references.summary_zh: 将复杂问题分解为子问题分别检索再重排序的 RAG 管道；为 skill 工程的多跳信息广度收集提供分解-检索-重排模板。
references.summary_en: An LLM-based query-decomposition pipeline that retrieves per sub-question then reranks merged results; a drop-in breadth-expansion template for evidence collection.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2507.00355 (Jul 2025); URL verified; benchmarked on public datasets.

references.title_en: Precise Zero-Shot Dense Retrieval without Relevance Labels (HyDE)
references.title_zh: 无相关标注的精确零样本密集检索（HyDE）
references.authors_or_org: Gao L, Ma X, Lin J, Callan J
references.summary_zh: 让 LLM 生成假设性答案文档，再以其嵌入检索真实文档，从查询-文档匹配转为文档-文档匹配；为 skill 工程的查询扩展提供嵌入级方法。
references.summary_en: HyDE generates a hypothetical answer document and uses its embedding for retrieval, shifting query-to-document into document-to-document matching; an embedding-level query-expansion technique.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2212.10496 (Dec 2022); URL verified; widely adopted and reproducible.

references.title_en: DeepWideSearch: Benchmarking Depth and Width in Agentic Information Seeking
references.title_zh: DeepWideSearch：智能体信息获取的深度与广度基准
references.authors_or_org: Lan T, Zhu B, Jia Q, et al.
references.summary_zh: 首个同时评测智能体多跳推理深度与大规模信息广度的基准（220 题 × 15 领域），顶级智能体成功率仅 2.39%；揭示深广兼备数据收集的核心挑战。
references.summary_en: The first benchmark evaluating agents on simultaneous deep multi-hop reasoning and wide information collection (220 questions, 15 domains); identifies failure modes for breadth+depth gathering.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2510.20168 (Oct 2025); URL verified; preprint, novel benchmark.

references.title_en: From Fluent to Verifiable: Claim-Level Auditability for Deep Research Agents
references.title_zh: 从流利到可验证：深度研究智能体的声明级可审计性
references.authors_or_org: Rasheed RA, Banerjee S, Mukherjee A, Hazra R
references.summary_zh: 提出可审计自主研究（AAR）标准，用来源覆盖度、来源准确性、矛盾透明度衡量 AI 研究报告的声明级可溯源性；为 skill 建立每条声明可追溯到证据的规范。
references.summary_en: Proposes the AAR standard with metrics (provenance coverage, soundness, contradiction transparency) for claim-level auditability; establishes that every claim should trace to specific evidence.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2602.13855 (Feb 2026); URL verified; recent preprint, treat findings as emerging.

references.title_en: PaperTrail: A Claim-Evidence Interface for Grounding Provenance in LLM-based Scholarly Q&A
references.title_zh: PaperTrail：LLM 学术问答中的声明-证据来源接口
references.authors_or_org: Martin-Boyle A, Leckey CAC, Brown MC, Kaur H
references.summary_zh: 将 LLM 回答与来源文献分解为离散声明并逐一映射，揭示未支持声明和遗漏；为 skill 工程的声明-证据粒度对齐提供用户研究支撑。
references.summary_en: An interface decomposing answers and sources into discrete claims mapped to evidence, revealing unsupported assertions and omissions; backs fine-grained claim-evidence alignment.
references.reliability_notes: arXiv 2602.21045 (Feb 2026); URL verified; recent preprint with a 26-researcher user study.

references.title_en: ANSI/NISO Z39.19-2005 (R2010): Guidelines for Monolingual Controlled Vocabularies
references.title_zh: ANSI/NISO Z39.19-2005（R2010）：单语受控词汇指南
references.authors_or_org: NISO (National Information Standards Organization)
references.summary_zh: 规定叙词表、分类体系的构建规则与等价/层级/相关关系；为 skill 工程的查询扩展、同义词管理和检索词规范化提供标准依据。
references.summary_en: Specifies construction rules and relationship types for controlled vocabularies (thesauri, taxonomies); the standards basis for query expansion and synonym management.
references.reliability_notes: Published 2005, reaffirmed 2010; stable NISO standard.

references.title_en: OSINT Framework: Open-Source Intelligence Tool Directory
references.title_zh: OSINT Framework：开源情报工具目录
references.authors_or_org: Justin Nordine
references.summary_zh: 按类别（人员、邮件、社媒、地理、暗网等 30+ 类）组织的免费 OSINT 工具树形索引；为 skill 工程提供多渠道、多角度数据源 fan-out 的工具参考。
references.summary_en: A tree-structured directory of 30+ categories of free OSINT tools; a multi-angle source fan-out reference for evidence-gathering agents.
references.reliability_notes: Community-maintained; tool availability may change but structure and methodology are stable; use as a living index.

references.title_en: Information Foraging Theory
references.title_zh: 信息觅食理论
references.authors_or_org: Pirolli P, Card SK (PARC)
references.summary_zh: 将最优觅食理论应用于信息搜索，核心概念信息气味解释何时深入、何时转向；为 skill 工程的广度/深度策略选择和检索终止条件提供认知科学依据。
references.summary_en: Applies optimal-foraging theory to information seeking; the 'information scent' concept explains diving deeper vs. branching out, grounding breadth/depth strategy switching and search termination.
references.reliability_notes: Well-cited Wikipedia overview; foundational Pirolli and Card papers (1999-2007) are mature and stable.

references.title_en: Delphi Process: A Methodology for the Elicitation of Opinions of Experts
references.title_zh: 德尔菲法：专家意见汇集方法论
references.authors_or_org: Dalkey N, Helmer O (RAND Corporation)
references.summary_zh: RAND 开发的迭代匿名专家意见汇集与收敛方法；为 skill 工程在缺乏文献覆盖领域进行结构化专家知识收集提供方法论模板。
references.summary_en: The original RAND Delphi method for iterative anonymized expert elicitation until consensus; a template for knowledge collection in domains with sparse documentary evidence.
references.reliability_notes: Classic RAND paper (P3925); direct fetch may 403 but the paper is catalogued at rand.org; very stable citation.
